xgboost.labelSource: Full ISO11228 Pirawan.xlsx workbook labels combined with research-team REBA labels and optional calibration labels from /Users/kpc/Documents/TestSookta/Calibtation/Calibtation.pdf

logisticRegression.reason: The calibration PDF provides REBA/ISO/SookTa scores only and no Logistic Regression coefficients or daily treatment outcome labels. Current posture assessment uses XGBoost/ONNX; daily 7-transaction prediction uses assets/ml/daily_injury_logistic_model.json.

requiredBeforeResearchTrainedAbTest: Expand expert labels to more media sessions before claiming a fully validated research-trained model.
Run on-device ONNX inference tests against fixed sample joint-feature vectors from the expert-labeled research dataset.
Calibrate the XGBoost probability thresholds again after additional low-risk and very-high-risk samples are labeled.
notes: The Logistic Regression artifact in assets/models/logistic_weights.json is retained only for legacy research traceability and is no longer packaged as a Flutter asset. It is not used for today's REBA/ISO assessment result.

The XGBoost ONNX model was retrained on 2026-06-07 after extracting the full ISO11228 Pirawan.xlsx workbook into 34 ISO labels and adding the calibration PDF as an optional label source. The current downloaded raw pose dataset has no transplanting/fertilizing pose rows, so calibrationMatchedSampleCount is 0 until those media rows are downloaded/extracted.
The full ISO workbook raises the current matched pose dataset to high/veryHigh labels only; collect more low/medium posture media before treating holdout accuracy as final validation.
The ONNX model accepts the canonical 51 raw MoveNet features so the current Flutter ONNX predictor can run it without a separate preprocessing layer.
Daily seven-transaction injury/treatment follow-up prediction uses assets/ml/daily_injury_logistic_model.json and remains separate from REBA/ISO posture scoring.
It is suitable for research-prototype risk communication and repeated data collection, not for clinical diagnosis or a validated injury prediction claim.
